rulings.Case Title: STEVEN RAMON TUGGLE VS. JUDITH PATRICIA HEHIR (Provide Access)
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JANUARY 2, 2007, LINE 2, PLAINTIFF STEVEN TUGGLE'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate IS DENIED, NO BASIS FOR RELIEF. MATERIALS PLAINTIFF IS REQUESTING ARE NOT IN THE COURT'S POSSESSION. PLAINTIFF MUST DIRECT DISCOVERY REQUESTS TO THE PARTY IN POSSESSION OF THE MATERIALS SOUGHT. =(302/PHA/ju)
